text:
In addition to the information required in Section 520.054 (General License Application Requirements) , a motor vehicle title service license applicant that intends to engage in business as a partnership shall submit an application that includes the following information:

(1) the name, address, date of birth, and social security number of each partner;

(2) information about each partner as required by the county tax assessor-collector to establish the business reputation and character of the applicant; and

(3) a statement indicating whether a partner or employee has been refused a motor vehicle title service license or a title service runner’s license or has been the holder of a license that was revoked or suspended.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.056 — Application Requirements: Partnership

In addition to the information required in Section 520.054 (General License Application Requirements) , a motor vehicle title service license applicant that intends to engage in business as a partnership shall submit an application that includes the following information:

    (1) the name, address, date of birth, and social security number of each partner;

    (2) information about each partner as required by the county tax assessor-collector to establish the business reputation and character of the applicant; and

    (3) a statement indicating whether a partner or employee has been refused a motor vehicle title service license or a title service runner’s license or has been the holder of a license that was revoked or suspended.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1478, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: In addition to the information required in Section 520.054 (General License Application Requirements) , a motor vehicle title service license applicant that intends to engage in business as a partnership shall submit an application that includes the following information:
the name, address, date of birth, and social security number of each partner;
information about each partner as required by the county tax assessor-collector to establish the business reputation and character of the applicant; and

a statement indicating whether a partner or employee has been refused a motor vehicle title service license or a title service runner’s license or has been the holder of a license that was revoked or suspended.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1478, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.
